reasoning: Discord is clearly on an active path to an IPO, moving from rumors to hiring JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs in March 2025, to completing a founder-to-professional CEO transition on April 23, 2025 (with Humam Sakhnini taking over to lead the company public). While an IPO in 2025 is very highly likely, the question is whether they will file an S-1 or officially announce it on their blog by July 1, 2025 (~38 days from the forecast date of May 23). A new CEO often needs 1-3 months to get up to speed, refine the roadshow pitch, and review the S-1, making a June filing highly possible but not a certainty (it could slip to August/September for a late 2025 IPO). Given the rapid sequence of events, a public S-1 or a PR announcing a confidential SEC submission in June is very plausible, but the short timeframe warrants keeping the probability slightly above a coin-flip.
